majors.name: Aerospace Engineering
majors.rawMinGpa: 3.0 minimum cumulative GPA across all college coursework
majors.rawMinCredits: 12 transferable credits completed, but 30+ credits strongly recommended
requiredCourses: MATH 141 - Calculus II (grade of B- or better)
PHYS 161 - General Physics I: Mechanics (grade of B- or better)
CHEM 135 - General Chemistry for Engineers (or CHEM 131 & 132; grade of C- or better)

english.raw: TOEFL iBT: 96 minimum, IELTS: 7.0 minimum, Duolingo: 120 minimum

majors.note: Official LEP requirements: https://lep.umd.edu/engineering.html. Admission is competitive. Limited to only one gateway or performance review course repeat, which counts 'W' as an attempt.
